name: colab-print
description: Direct, pixel-faithful PDF export for Google Colab notebooks. A Manifest V3 Chromium extension with zero runtime dependencies.
author: Ammaar Alam

scripts.check: node --check src/background/service-worker.js && node --check src/content/main.js && node --check src/popup/popup.js && node --check src/export/export.js && node --check src/shared/capture-plan.js && node --check src/shared/filename.js && node --check src/shared/job-store.js && node --check src/shared/paper.js && node --check src/shared/pdf-writer.js && node --check src/shared/provider.js
